title: Adiye Unna Paathida Lyrics Vetrivel
stanzas:
pozhudhum un vaasana
aasaiya koottudhe
adangaa matha yaanaiya
pol thaakkuthe

usure.. un oara paarva
sakkaratha nenjukulla
suththa viduthe

Adiye unna
paathida paathida
naan kolanjaene
azhagaa indha
aaradi aambalaiyaa
velanjaene

Yedhukku ena nee
poraiyaera oottura
soruthu kaiyira
vizhiyaala maatura

munnazhagil neethaan
murkkera jaada kaattura
otha nodi kooda
othungaama theeya mootura

engo edhum neeyaaga
un nenappu theeyaaga
pudichen pudichen
nenjil aani adichen.

unna naan Nenachaa
thirumaagi poguren
velakku thirinaan
vidivellai aaguren

eththanaiyo vaartha
therinjaalum vaaya mooduren
oththa pana oala
adhu pola naanum aaduren

siththathula noiyaaga
moththathula thaaiyaaga
kedacha kedacha
enna yaendi kalachcha

pozhudhum un vaasana
aasaiya koottudhe
adangaa matha yaanaiya
pol thaakkuthe

usure.. un oara paarva
sakkaratha nenjukulla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Adiye Unna Paathida?

The song is sung by Sathya Prakash and Vandhana Srinivasan.

Who composed the music for the movie Vetrivel?

The music for the movie was composed by D Imman.

What is the theme of the song Adiye Unna Paathida?

The song portrays the emotions of love and admiration, encapsulating the beauty of romantic feelings.

Who are the lead actor and actress in the movie Vetrivel?

The lead actor is Sasikumar, and the lead actress is Mia George.

When was the movie Vetrivel released?

The movie was released in the year 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song "Adiye Unna Paathida" from the 2016 Tamil movie "Vetrivel" features the lead actor Sasikumar and actress Mia George. Composed by D Imman and sung by Sathya Prakash and Vandhana Srinivasan, this melodious duet captures the essence of love and admiration. The lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of longing and affection, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. This song is a testament to the film's heartfelt narrative and the musical brilliance of its creators.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adiye Unna Paathida, a mesmerizing melody from the film Vetrivel, captures the essence of love and longing. Composed by the talented D Imman and beautifully rendered by singers Sathya Prakash and Vandhana Srinivasan, this song resonates with heartfelt emotions. Experience the magic of Tamil cinema through this unforgettable musical gem.
stanzaMeanings: Adiye Unna Paathida Song Lyrics Vetrivel
I am lost in seeing you, I am captivated.
This beautiful girl has captured my heart.
At all times, your fragrance draws me in like a wild elephant.
Oh, your single glance is like sweet nectar that fills my heart.
I am lost in seeing you, I am captivated. This beautiful girl has captured my heart.
Why do you act like you don't care? Your gaze is like a trap.
In the past, you were the one who showed me the way, now you are hiding from me.
Wherever you are, your thoughts are in my heart, I have embraced them tightly.
I am lost in seeing you, I am captivated.
If I think of you, I will become pure and bright like a lamp.
No matter how many words I know, I keep my mouth shut, just like a coin that doesn't make noise, I too will dance quietly.
In the end, if there is pain, it feels like a mother’s love, why do you make me suffer?
Oh, I am lost in seeing you, I am captivated.
This beautiful girl has captured my heart.
At all times, your fragrance draws me in like a wild elephant.
Oh, your single glance is like sweet nectar that fills my heart.
